text.title: micro-mvps Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for micro-mvps as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Validation theatre: a beautifully designed landing page with no distribution plan. The page converts at 0.1% from cold ads but the team declares "validated."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The traffic source determines the signal quality more than the asset does. The same page hits 10% on Hacker News Show HN and 0.5% on cold ads. Require an explicit traffic source in the pre-registration before any asset is built.

failure-mode.description: Compound experiments: testing two assumptions simultaneously (e.g. demand AND price sensitivity on the same landing page).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: When the hypothesis is wrong, you cannot identify which assumption failed. Single-assumption experiments produce actionable decisions; compound experiments produce ambiguous data that justifies continuing.

failure-mode.description: Post-hoc threshold setting: deciding whether the experiment "succeeded" after seeing the conversion data.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Survivorship bias makes any result look like it was close to success. Pre-registration removes the ability to move the goalposts after seeing the outcome.

failure-mode.description: Inflated asset bundle: building case studies, customer logos, and testimonials for a one-week experiment.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A micro-MVP needs a headline, sub-headline, three value-prop bullets, and a CTA. Additional content delays launch and adds signal noise. Cap copy explicitly.

failure-mode.description: Fake-door experiment with no ethical unwind plan. Users click "Get Early Access" and receive no follow-up.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Trust violation. Transparency is required: inform users the feature does not exist yet and offer them something real (a waitlist, a refund, a free trial). Plan this before launch.

failure-mode.description: Declaring "inconclusive, extend" after every failed experiment. Maximum one 7-day extension; then make a decision on available data.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Indefinite extensions are equivalent to having no success criterion. The purpose of the experiment is to produce a decision under uncertainty, not to wait for certainty.

failure-mode.description: LLMs ship "validation theatre" — beautifully written landing pages with no real distribution plan. Force the prompt to include a traffic-source section.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Language models optimize for coherent prose, not distribution strategy. Without explicit prompting, they produce polished but untestable outputs.

failure-mode.description: Models hallucinate plausible conversion-rate benchmarks ("industry standard is 8%"). Require citation or omit; otherwise the success criterion is anchored on fiction.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Plausible-sounding numbers get cached into decision-making even when unsourced.

failure-mode.description: Agents will inflate the asset bundle (case studies, logos, testimonials) for a 1-week experiment. Cap copy length explicitly.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without constraints, models default to comprehensive design, not minimal validation.

failure-mode.description: Post-experiment, agents have a strong bias to declare "inconclusive, extend." Force the decision rule with a hard cap (e.g. max 1 extension).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Models optimize for narrative coherence; inconclusive results generate more coherent extended narratives than hard decisions.

failure-mode.description: Human-in-loop checkpoint: pre-registration commit before any traffic touches the asset. Agents can draft, humans must approve.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-registration integrity requires human sign-off; agents cannot bind themselves to thresholds.

failure-mode.description: Human-in-loop checkpoint: ethical unwind plan must be human-signed, especially for fake-door experiments that collect data.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Do not let the agent run the post-mortem alone — it tends to weave a coherent narrative regardless of result, masking learning.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Models prioritize narrative closure over accurate causal inference.
